seo.title: Privacy Policy – SSVID
seo.meta_description: Read SSVID's Privacy Policy. We do not store videos, do not collect personal data, and respect user privacy when using our online YouTube downloader.

hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us at SSVID

sections.content: This Privacy Policy explains how SSVID (ssvid.cc) handles information when you use our website. By accessing or using SSVID, you agree to the terms described in this policy.

SSVID does not require user registration and does not collect personal information such as names, addresses, phone numbers, or payment details. Users can access all features without providing any personal data.

SSVID does not host, upload, copy, or store any videos or audio files. All processing is temporary and strictly limited to generating download links. Downloaded files are delivered directly to the user's device and are not retained on our servers.

Like most websites, SSVID may automatically collect limited non-personal technical information such as IP address, browser type, operating system, and access time. This information is used solely for security, analytics, and website performance improvement.
SSVID may use cookies or similar technologies to enhance user experience. Cookies do not contain personal information, and users can disable cookies at any time through their browser settings.

SSVID does not store content and does not control videos or data provided by third-party platforms such as YouTube. The SSVID website does not actively link to or promote external websites. All content accessed through SSVID remains under the control of the original source platform.
We apply reasonable security measures to protect our website and users from unauthorized access, alteration, or misuse of data.
Users have the right to use SSVID anonymously. If you have any questions or concerns regarding privacy, you may contact us at any time.

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email: contact.ssvidcc@gmail.com
SSVID may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page and become effective immediately upon posting.
